positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a sleeping sloth wearing a tiny graduation cap, surrounded by floating academic scrolls, stars, and delicate constellations. The scene should be composed with a strong central silhouette on a pure, contrasting background. Use a vibrant, limited color palette of deep forest green, royal blue, gold leaf accents, and cream. The style must be highly detailed vector illustration, combining elements of retro mid-century modern graphic design and delicate folklore etching. Clean lines, high contrast, and flat graphic quality for seamless apparel printing. Isolated subject on white background. --ar 1:1 --style cinematic --v 6.0
